classificationReason: The direct FOR-418 scratch+storage pass covers the same 16 mutating FOR-401 pixels. For every record, shader-return storage is observed but remains zero, while the same pass's no-blend RGBA16Float color target is non-zero.
globalClassification: FOR-418 narrows divergence to storage/shader-return side-channel
nextStep: Inspect why the diagnostic storage branch writes zero while @location(0) still produces the non-zero color-target output in the same pass.
nonGoalsPreserved: No score, threshold, fallback, or promotion changed.
No value is synthesized when a runtime hook is unavailable.

colorTarget.reason: FOR-418 sampled the RGBA16Float scratch target from the same no-blend pass that wrote shader-return storage.

records.divergenceReason: FOR-418 wrote zero to shader-return storage while the same diagnostic scratch render pass produced a non-zero RGBA16Float color target sample.

storageSamples.reason: FOR-418 captured the same shader-return value in storage during the no-blend scratch pass that writes the comparison color target.
